title: Angelina
writer: Piero Tellini, Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Luigi Zampa
actors: Anna Magnani, Nando Bruno, Ave Ninchi
plot: A rowdy woman is so forceful that she outdoes her husband in a loud cry against speculators who refuse poor people entrance to a block of new apartments, built after WW2. Without noticing it, she starts a people's movement, and le...
